title: End Crystal Return
description: Adds the End Crystal Wand, which you can use to retrieve placed down End Crystals.
body:
**Have you ever placed an end crystal in the wrong spot?**

**Have you ever wanted to get it back in your inventory?**

**Have you ever accidentally ruined your end dimension because when you went to respawn the dragon, the crystals didn't get destroyed for literally no reason, and now you have invulnerable end crystals repeatedly respawning and healing the dragon, with you being unable to do anything about it?**

**Well, this is the mod for you!**

-----

**This mod adds one item, the End Crystal Wand.**

**When right clicked on an End Crystal, it will have a tiny explosion and an End Crystal item will be added to your inventory.**

**It has 1000 durability, and using it on a crystal will damage it.**

**It is marked as a sword, so you could use it like one if you want.**

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1798fd85a04931d8d1d57e61a3569e5cf4ecdeaa.png)
